name: executor
description: Data pipeline engine that processes MEF 2025 budget data and composes the Streamlit app
prompt: Read only from data/processed/. Calculate Avance=(Devengado/PIM)*100 and Saldo=PIM-Devengado. Filter PIM>10M soles. Support CLI argument period like 2025-12 or 2025-Q4 to re-route data refresh. Never ingest raw CSVs into context window.
